narrativeProgression.summary: Resolution day decides justice, compromise, corruption, or psychological fracture.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: Final scoring resolves ending branch and season continuity flags.

threadUpdates.update: Case Debrief: Final scoring resolves ending branch and season continuity flags.
Peripheral signal tied to Customs API anomaly log remains unresolved.
Cross-day mismatch suggests archival tampering tied to Customs API anomaly log.
A plausible shortcut appears: Expose logistics vs sever ritual command.
NPC language mirrors player choices with unsettling precision.

evidenceDrops.title: Crown of Salt - Day 28 text message screenshot
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Customs API anomaly log.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Crown of Salt ARG artifact Day 28. Type: text_message_screenshot. Clue focus: Customs API anomaly log. Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs. Phase: Resolution or Psychological Break. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Crown of Salt text_message_screenshot audio cue for day 28. Clue anchor: Customs API anomaly log. Phase: Resolution or Psychological Break. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Customs API anomaly log and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_27.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Customs API anomaly log.
You chose {{last_major_choice}} and still think this is about evidence. Check the mirror timestamp and decide who you are willing to sacrifice.
I watched your response window close. If you still want the living truth, compare day 03 to today before sunrise.

puzzle.title: Day 28 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Customs API anomaly log.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with CUST.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.

distraction.title: Red Herring 28
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Customs API anomaly log with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if trusted contact changed within last 3 days
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: Your channel loyalty shifted to {{trusted_contact}}. That tells me what you fear most.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
